steps.title: Read the intercept
steps.content: The $y$-intercept occurs when $x=0$. From the graph, the intercept value is $9$.

steps.title: Interpret the units
steps.content: Since $x=0$ means the end of $1992$, the intercept refers to that year. The $y$-values are in thousands of catalogs, so $9$ means $9{,}000$ catalogs.

steps.title: Choose the interpretation
steps.content: The statement must describe the estimated number of catalogs sent at the end of $1992$ as $9{,}000$. The answer is D.
